pillars.title: Blocks UV+420
pillars.description: Protects family from harmful UV & blue light.

pillars.title: Reduce Heat
pillars.description: Up to 90% — keep your home cooler & comfortable.

pillars.title: Save Energy
pillars.description: Lower electricity bills with better heat control.

pillars.title: Protect Interiors
pillars.description: Prevents fading on furniture, floor, curtain & artworks.

pillars.description: Enjoy natural light without compromising privacy.

_unplaced.note: Copy from the Residential Guide screen with no expressible section field. Preserved verbatim.
_unplaced.chapter-lesson-counts: Every chapter card and accordion row states '6 Lessons' and shows 4 lesson bullets plus '+ 2 more lessons'. Only the 4 visible lessons per chapter are transcribed (28 of a claimed 42); the remaining 14 lesson titles are a client ask.
_unplaced.hero-chip-pairs: Hero benefit chips are two-part on screen (e.g. 'Reduce Heat / Up to 90%'); BenefitItem-style meta has a single label, so pairs are joined with an em dash.
_unplaced.newsletter: Footer block: 'Newsletter — Stay updated with the latest tips, offers and new technologies.' with an email input — footer chrome, no section type.
